## Summary

- 

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit tests/integration`
- [ ] `pytest tests/gui` if GUI code changed
- [ ] Docs updated if commands, behavior, data, model, or license boundaries changed

## Safety and License

- [ ] No model weights, private datasets, API keys, or generated runs are committed
- [ ] Agent changes remain allowlisted and project-scoped
- [ ] Dataset/model changes include provenance and license notes
